overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Harry Potter video game (Hogwarts Legacy) showing a Gryffindor student with red hair walking through Hogwarts castle. The character exits an astronomy tower room with blue celestial tapestries, descends a spiral staircase with changing lighting conditions, passes through stone corridors, and approaches the Room of Requirement.

events.description: character exits the tapestry room through a doorway into a spiral staircase tower

agents.ego_description: walking through the astronomy tower room past large blue tapestries depicting celestial figures and astrological instruments

blue tapestry with star charts and tree motifs
blue tapestry showing a seated figure with astronomical instruments
brass armillary sphere on a wooden stand
simple wooden bench against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character stands in an astronomy tower room adorned with large blue tapestries depicting celestial scenes and robed figures. The room contains astronomical instruments including a brass armillary sphere. The character walks forward and exits through a doorway into a spiral staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral staircase with tall arched windows

events.description: entering the spiral staircase tower with greenish stone walls and tall windows
passing from bright window light into a slightly darker section of the staircase

agents.ego_description: walking down the spiral staircase, circling around the central column past tall arched windows

entered.detail: wooden spiral staircase winding around a central stone column
tall gothic arched window with bright daylight streaming through
thick stone support column with carved details

segments.scene_description: The character descends a spiral staircase with greenish stone walls and tall arched windows that let in bright natural light. The wooden stairs curve around a central stone column as the character continues downward.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower spiral staircase with suit of armor display

events.description: stone walls shift from greenish tone to warm brown sandstone color
passing a full suit of armor standing in a wall niche

agents.ego_description: continuing down the spiral staircase as the architecture shifts to warmer stone tones, passing a decorative suit of armor

entered.detail: full plate armor standing on display in a wall niche

segments.scene_description: The descent continues through a lower section of the spiral staircase where the stone walls transition to warm brown sandstone. The character passes a full suit of armor displayed in a wall niche as the staircase curves downward.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle corridor with side study room

events.description: exiting spiral staircase into a stone corridor with landscape painting
entering a side room with furniture and decorative rug
exiting the side room back into the main corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor, briefly entering a furnished side room with books and furniture, then returning to the main hallway

entered.detail: gothic stone archway leading to the corridor
large framed painting of a sunset landscape hanging on the wall
small room with wooden bench, bookshelves, and a decorative rug
blue patterned rug on the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: The character exits the staircase into a dimly lit stone corridor featuring a large landscape painting. The character enters a small side room furnished with a bench, bookshelves, and a decorative rug, then exits back to the corridor to continue forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor leading to the Room of Requirement

events.description: approaching the ornate carved door of the Room of Requirement
character interacts with the door to open it, revealing darkness inside

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor toward the Room of Requirement door and opening it

entered.detail: large ornate wooden door with intricate carvings and metal detailing

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down the final stretch of corridor toward the Room of Requirement. The ornate carved wooden door becomes visible ahead. The character approaches and opens the door, which swings inward to reveal darkness beyond as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the celestial heights of an astronomy tower down through the winding architecture of the castle toward a mysterious hidden room. It begins in a room adorned with blue celestial tapestries and brass armillary spheres before the character exits through a doorway to descend a spiral staircase. As the character moves downward, the environment shifts from bright natural light filtering through arched windows and greenish stone walls to the warm brown sandstone of the lower levels, passing a suit of armor in a wall niche. The scene then opens into a dimly lit stone corridor featuring a large landscape painting, where the camera briefly enters a small side room with bookshelves and a rug before returning to the main path. Finally, the character proceeds down the last stretch of the hallway toward an ornate carved wooden door, which swings inward to reveal a void of darkness.
